name: @freesail/catalogs
description: All first-party UI component catalogs for Freesail

scripts.prebuild: freesail prepare catalog && freesail validate catalog

author: Thendral AI Ltd

standard.title: Freesail Standard Catalog
standard.description:
Unified catalog of standard A2UI components and functions.

### Function Call Syntax

When using functions in component properties (e.g. `checks`, `value`, `text`, `min`, `max`):

**Single-argument functions** (`not`, `isEmpty`, `required`, `email`, `regex`, etc.) use a named-key object for `args`:
```json
{ "call": "not", "args": { "value": { "call": "isEmpty", "args": { "value": { "path": "/data/x" } } } } }
```

**Multi-argument functions** (`lte`, `gte`, `lt`, `gt`, `eq`, `neq`, `and`, `or`, `length`, `numeric`) take positional args — pass them as an **array**:
```json
{ "call": "lte", "args": [{ "path": "/formData/dob" }, { "call": "now" }] }
{ "call": "and", "args": [{ "call": "required", "args": { "value": { "path": "/a" } } }, { "call": "required", "args": { "value": { "path": "/b" } } }] }
```

chat.title: Freesail Chat Catalog
chat.description: Chat interface components for Freesail Agent-driven UI. Provides a complete chat experience as an A2UI surface.
